titleStmt.title: SII 22.60: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 60. (A.R. No. 60 of 1906) TANJAVUR DISTRICT, MAYURAM TALUK, TIRUMAYĀNAM. BRAHMAPURĪŚVARA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. TRIBHUVANAVĪRA (KULŌTTUṄGA III)—33rd YEAR (A.D. 1210-11)

summary.p: The inscription begins with the mention of the king's conquest of Madurai and Īḻam and Karuvūr and his anointment as hero and victor. It records a gift of one mā of land at Tirumayāṉaviḷāgam after reclamation by a Śivabrāhmaṇa of the temple by name Āttiraiyar Nambi Āḷavandi alias Poṟkōyil-Bhaṭṭaṉ to provide for the requirements of worship to the goddess Vāḍāmulai-Nāchchiyār on a special festival day in the year. The land was left in charge of one Śēṟṟuḍaiyāṉ Perumāḷ on vāḍākkaḍamai (perpetual lease) and he was to measure out 5 kalam of paddy for the purpose mentioned.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tiripuvaṉaccakkara
vattikaḷ maturai
yum Īḻamum karuvū
rum pāṇṭiyaṉ
muṭittalaiyum
koṇṭu virara
viṣekamum vicai
yar Aviṣekamum pa
ṇṇiaruḷiṉa śrī [ tiribhu]
vaṉaviratevaṟku yāṇ
ṭu muppattu muṉṟāvatu jayaṅ
koṇṭacoḻavaḷanāṭṭu
Ākkūr nāṭṭu Amparanāṭuṭpa
ṭameviya tirukkaṭavūr Uṭai
yār tirumaiyāṉamuṭaiya
perumāḷ koyil civappi
rāmaṇaṉ Āttiraiyar nampi Ā
ḷavantiyāṉa poṟkoyil
paṭṭaṉ vāṭāmulainācciyā
rkkākat tirupputiyitu Amu
tu ceyvittaruḷap paccai
valañceykiṟa paccai
kaṇṇokkap puṟappaṭṭa
ruḷit tirumaṇṭapattu Eḻun
taruḷi tiruvamutu mika Amutu ce
ytaruḷap poṉakappaḻaarici
kalam parupput tūṇip patak
ku kaṟiamutu niṟai nāṉūṟṟu Aim
patiṉpalam pālamutu Iru
nāḻi Uppu Amutu nāḻi mū Uḻa
kku miḷakuamutu Uḻakku cirakam
Oṉṟekāṟ ceviṭu teṅkā
y Āṟu neyamutu Uḻakkaruva
ḻakkapā[kaṟpūram ?] Eṇpalam vāḻaip
paḻam nāṟpatu Aṭaikkāy A
mutu pākku Eḻupattu Aiñcu veṟu
ilai Amutu paṟṟu Oṉṟemuk
kāle Araikkālukkum tirumai
yāṉaviḷākattu cimāṟkeṇ
ṭayavatikkuk kiḻakku Irācenti
racoḻavāykkālukkut
teṟku Eḻāṅkaṇṭattu Iv
vūr Uḻavaṭaiuṭaiya ceṟ
ṟuṭaiyāṉ perumāḷ maṇ
ṇeṟu kollaiyil maṇ
ṇilaiyiṟ cetta
tuk kallak kācu kuṭu
ttuk kalli viṭṭa vi
ḷainilam pa Iṉṉilam Oru
māvukkum varicaippaṭi
ḷa � Iṉṉellu Ai
ṅkalamum Aḷakkum Iṭa
ttup piṉṉai Eṉṉātāṉ
perumpaṇṭārattup piṉ
ṉaieṉṉātāṉ marakkālāl Aḷa
kkavum Iṉṉellu Aiṅkala
mum Aḷakkum Iṭattu vāṭākka
ṭamaiyāka Iṉṉilam Orumā
vum Icceṟṟuṭaiyāṉ pe
rumāḷ kaikkoṇṭu Iṉṉe
llu Aiṅkalamum cantirātit
(t)aivarai Iṟukka kaṭavanāṉa(ṉa)
paṭikkuk kalveṭṭu Ivai
ceṟṟuṭaipperumāḷ kaimmāṭ
ṭāṅku Āṉamaikku Ivai Irācavi
ccātirakon Aṟika .
Digital edition of SII 22.60 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
